caption: cyRespond to a property possession claim
title: cyContact preference
content:
cyImportant documents like orders will always be sent by post.

cyYou can choose whether case updates should be sent to you by post or email while you are acting for your client. For example, when a hearing has been scheduled or a document is ready to view online.

labels.question: cyHow should you receive updates while acting for your client?

errors.contactByEmailOrPost: cySelect how you should receive updates while acting for your client
errors.contactByEmailOrPost.email.invalid: cyEnter an email address in the correct format, like name@example.com
